name: Interview Transcript Analysis
description: Analyzes a live interview transcript and returns actionable interviewer insights including a summary, key signals, follow-up questions, and a hiring recommendation.

testInputs.transcript: The candidate described their experience leading a cross-functional team of 8 engineers. They mentioned using Agile sprints and weekly stand-ups. When asked about handling conflict, they gave an example of mediating a disagreement between a product manager and a backend engineer by aligning both sides on user impact.
